description: This file defines utility functions for string manipulation, providing methods for joining a linked list into a string and splitting a string into a linked list, using external utility classes JoinUtils and SplitUtils.

classes.name: StringUtils
classes.description: An object providing string utility functions for joining and splitting strings.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Joins a linked list into a string using JoinUtils.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a string into a linked list using SplitUtils.
